title: Galactic Protocol Integrity Fields
description: Required integrity fields for all Galactic Protocol messages — prevents forgery, tampering, and replay attacks per galactic-protocol.md §Message Integrity

message_id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for deduplication and audit trail

origin_agent.description: Persona name of the sending agent (kebab-case)

timestamp.description: Message creation time (ISO 8601). Must be within 5 min of receiver clock; messages older than 24h are rejected as stale

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of message payload (excluding integrity fields)

hash_algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used — always sha256 in protocol v1.2.0
